results.title: Major US Banks: Raising Our Fair Value Estimates after a Fresh Look | Morningstar
What to Watch As Big Banks Start Reporting Q1 Earnings This Week | Morningstar
FinancialContent - The Great Yield Curve Reset: Bank of America and Wells Fargo Lead Financial Sector into a Pivotal 2026
JPMorgan Worth More Than Citi, Bank of America, Wells Fargo

summary: JPMorgan market cap ~$800B dwarfs BAC ~$344B, WFC ~$260B, C ~$168B. BAC considered 'best idea' of the major bank group at current valuations per Morningstar. BAC+WFC are primary beneficiaries of yield curve normalization. Wells Fargo is laggard (down 8% YTD) on NII guidance miss. Citi relative outperformer on low valuation and Treasury/trade momentum. Morningstar raised BAC fair value from $58 to $65.
